# Acceptance Criteria — <Area Name>

*Optional. Use this only when acceptance checks are large, cross-release, or maintained by people who do not edit the spec. Otherwise keep checks in the active spec.*

## Open

- [ ] *One behavior the area must satisfy, written so a reviewer can confirm it without reading code.*

## Satisfied

*Move items here when met, with the date they were verified. Do not delete.*

- [x] *Met item — YYYY-MM-DD.*
